# Pull Request

## Type of Change
- [ ] New company entry
- [ ] Update to existing stack
- [ ] New or updated interview questions
- [ ] Documentation / tooling

## Company
**Name:** 
**Sector:** (fintech / agritech / logistics / saas)

## Proof of Source
Every stack claim must be backed by at least one verifiable source.

- [ ] Job post link: 
- [ ] Engineering blog link: 
- [ ] Conference talk / GitHub / other:
- [ ] Employee testimony (anonymous summary — no names, no NDA violations)

## Checklist
- [ ] `stack.json` validates against `schema.json` (ran `python scripts/validator.py`)
- [ ] Followed formatting rules in [contribution-standards.md](../docs/contribution-standards.md)
- [ ] No rumors, speculation, or unverified claims
- [ ] `last_verified` date is set to today
